channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Moins cher qu’un iPhone, Apple lance le MacBook Neo
item.description: Cela fait des mois, et peut-être même des années, qu’Apple préparait un ordinateur portable à un prix plus abordable que le MacBook Air actuel. Cette fois, c’est finalement la bonne avec le MacBook Neo qui détonne à partir de 699 €.

item.title: Google reveals dev-focused Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, promises 'best-in-class intelligence for your highest-volume workloads'
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite offers outstanding cost efficiency, beating rival models in more than half of these benchmarks.

item.title: Exclusive: ‘Will we ever see a new FinePix? Unlikely’ says Fujifilm, as its compact cameras have evolved intro pricey retro models
item.description: We spoke with Fujifilm's General Manager for Imaging Solutions in the UK, Theo Georghiades, about making cameras fun again and which compact cameras make business sense

item.title: BYD Great Tang : voici l’intérieur ultra-luxueux du nouveau SUV électrique aux 1 000 km d’autonomie de la marque chinoise
item.description: BYD vient de dévoiler l'habitacle de sa nouvelle voiture électrique de luxe, le Great Tang. Un SUV imposant, techniquement assez ambitieux avec une autonomie gargantuesque et une charge en 10 minutes.

item.title: Where to preorder the new iPhone 17E before it hits stores on March 11th
item.description: Apple's week of product announcements kicked off with the iPhone 17E, a phone designed for those who don't want to spend north of $700 on their next upgrade. The iPhone 16E follow-up won't officially launch until March 11th; however, preorders are now open at Best Buy and Apple's online storefront, as well as carriers like […]

item.title: The Colorful MacBook Neo Is Apple’s Cheapest Laptop Ever
item.description: At $599, Apple's entry-level MacBook Neo is the most affordable laptop the company has ever made.

item.title: Windows 12 could arrive this year with rumored heavy AI focus — and the hate is strong already
item.description: Is Microsoft planning Windows 12 for this year? I doubt that, but the pre-emptive backlash against its AI features has already started.

item.title: MacBook Neo hands-on: Apple's $599 laptop feels shockingly great
item.description: The most interesting product Apple announced this week was its cheapest and least powerful laptop, the MacBook Neo. It’s just fascinating to see the company tackle an entirely new category — it’s not a premium ultraportable like the MacBook Air, and it’s not a computing powerhouse like the MacBook Pro. It’s simply an affordable $599 laptop. And after spending some time with it at Apple’s spring launch event today, I’m convinced it’s going to be a huge hit for the company. For a $599 system, the MacBook Neo doesn’t look or feel like a budget machine. Its colorful aluminum case looks even more a...

item.title: The $599 MacBook Neo is Apple's cheapest Mac laptop yet
item.description: Meet the MacBook Neo, Apple’s long-rumored low-cost Mac. Powered by the A18 Pro chip from the iPhone 16 Pro series, the $599 MacBook Neo is Apple’s first attempt at delivering a genuinely affordable Mac laptop. (Ironically, it comes after Apple raised the base prices of the new MacBook Air M5 and MacBook Pro M5 Pro/Max.) It’s well below the $1,099 MacBook Air, but Apple didn’t skimp on the design. For $599 you get 256GB of storage and no Touch ID on the keyboard; another $100 doubles the storage and adds Touch ID. All models of the MacBook Neo ship with an extremely scant 8GB of RAM — but at t...

item.title: Apple’s $600 MacBook Neo Finally Makes Laptops Cute Again
item.description: The new, colorful MacBook Neo is full of surprises, including a mobile chip.

item.title: Hausse des prix de la RAM, délais rallongés et pénurie, tout comprendre de la crise de la RAM
item.description: Vous entendez partout sans peut-être réellement comprendre les enjeux. La mémoire RAM s'arrache à prix d'or en ce moment et certains acteurs délaissent même le marché grand public. Une situation qui concerne en premier lieu les PC, mais pourrait par capillarité atteindre tous les produits tech. On vous explique tout ce que vous devez savoir à propos de la crise de la RAM. ...

item.title: All the news about Apple’s MacBook Neo, iPhone 17E, and more
item.description: Apple is kicking off March with a flurry of product announcements ahead of a “special Apple experience” on March 4th in New York City, London, and Shanghai. Apple started on March 2nd by announcing the iPhone 17E. The new $599 phone has a lot of welcome additions over the iPhone 16E, like support for MagSafe […]

item.title: iPhone 17e hands-on: nothing more, nothing less
item.description: Apple announced the $599 iPhone 17e earlier this week, and we just got a chance to play with one for a few minutes at the company's "experience" for media in New York City. The 17e is more or less exactly what you'd expect - a cheaper, simpler riff on the iPhone 17 that replaces the […]

item.title: Apple dévoile le MacBook Neo : moins cher, mais beaucoup de compromis
item.description: Apple annonce son tout nouveau MacBook Neo, et il était très attendu. Bien moins cher que les MacBook Air et MacBook Pro, ce nouveau Mac fait aussi de sérieux compromis.

item.title: Apple iPhone 17e preorders are finally live — and I've got the biggest and best discounts right here
item.description: Interested in the new iPhone 17e? Here are the biggest discounts from the US and UK's best retailers.

item.title: Apple launches budget-friendly MacBook Neo powered by an iPhone chip
item.description: Apple just announced a new entry-level MacBook that runs on the same A18 Pro chip that launched two years ago in its iPhone 16 lineup and starts at $599. With older M-series MacBooks being phased out, it's a cheaper alternative that competes with Windows and ChromeOS models, while using hardware that was already in mass […]

item.title: Le nouvel iPhone abordable d’Apple est en précommande avec un net avantage tarifaire par rapport à son prédécesseur
item.description: L'iPhone 17e vient avec son lot de nouveautés, mais aussi avec un prix plus avantageux que la génération précédente grâce à un doublage du stockage sans surcoût. Les précommandes sont dès à présent disponibles chez tous les e-commerçants.

item.title: Our first hands-on look at Apple’s MacBook Neo
item.description: Here is the MacBook Neo, Apple's new entry-level Mac laptop. Its colorful chassis options easily set it apart from current MacBook Air and Pro models. But the biggest difference is that inside the Neo is an A18 Pro iPhone chip instead of an M-series processor Apple typically uses in its laptops and recent desktops. The […]

item.title: AI is now part of the culture wars — and real wars
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, the newsletter for Verge subscribers that goes inside Washington's increasingly existential clashes between tech and politics. If this was forwarded to you, can I interest you in a full-fledged subscription to The Verge for only $40 a year? You'll get so much more than doomer scenarios. We cover non-existential fun […]...

item.title: Apple launches the MacBook Neo — and it starts at only $599
item.description: Apple has announced a more affordable laptop called the MacBook Neo — here's everything you need to know.

item.title: Le service de téléphonie de SpaceX devient Starlink Mobile et promet la 5G par satellite
item.description: Le service de téléphonie par satellite de Starlink change de nom : exit « Direct to Cell », la filiale de SpaceX a choisi d'aller au plus simple puisqu'il faut maintenant l'appeler… Starlink Mobile. De quoi donner des sueurs froides à tous les opérateurs mobiles de la planète, même si l'entreprise se défend de vouloir marcher sur leurs platebandes.

item.title: Le deal de Paramount « beaucoup plus clair » que celui de Netflix pour la FCC, plus rien n’empêche le rachat de Warner Bros.
item.description: Maintenant qu'un accord a été trouvé entre Paramount et Warner Bros. Discovery, il ne reste plus que l'examen des autorités de la concurrence pour valider le rachat. Or, cette étape décisive ne pourrait être qu'une formalité si on en croit les déclarations du président de la FCC.

item.title: Microsoft is reportedly planning a new 365 tier which charges AI agents like humans
item.description: A new Microsoft 365 plan could sit above E5, offering similar benefits plus Copilot and AI agent management.

item.title: PlayStation is reportedly moving away from PC ports
item.description: It sounds like PlayStation is putting its focus back on console exclusives. According to a report in Bloomberg, Sony's gaming division is moving away from porting PS5 games to PC, which reportedly includes cancelling plans for a PC port of Ghost of Yōtei. It's a big change from a few years ago, when Sony said […]

item.title: While Samsung gears up to release its 2026 TVs, you can find record-low prices on older models — here are 9 deals I recommend
item.description: As Samsung gears up to release its 2026 TVs, you can find record-low prices on its existing models, including up to $1,300 off Samsung 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: ‘Godzilla x Kong: Supernova’ May Have Just Confirmed a Classic Kaiju
item.description: Plus, 'Sonic 4' might have found some more wild casting.

item.title: One startup’s pitch to provide more reliable AI answers: crowdsource the chatbots
item.description: CollectivIQ looks to give users more accurate answers to their AI queries by showing them responses that pull information from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok — and up to 10 other models — all at the same time.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 2 on Apple TV?
item.description: Here's when Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2's second episode will roar onto Apple TV.

item.title: How to watch Indian Wells 2026: Live Streams & TV Channels for ATP and WTA 1000 tennis
item.description: Watch free streams from Indian Wells 2026 in tennis' unofficial fifth slam – TV channels, broadcasters and streams.

item.title: Pentagon vendor cutoff exposes the AI dependency map most enterprises never built
item.description: The federal directive ordering all U.S. government agencies to cease using Anthropic technology comes with a six-month phaseout window. That timeline assumes agencies already know where Anthropic’s models sit inside their workflows. Most don’t today.Most enterprises wouldn’t, either. The gap between what enterprises think they’ve approved and what’s actually running in production is wider than most security leaders realize.AI vendor dependencies don't stop at the contract you signed; they cascade through your vendors, your vendors' vendors, and the SaaS platforms your teams adopted without a p...

item.title: Target’s turnaround plan isn’t built for this moment
item.description: The retailer is betting on design and in-store delight to reverse years of declining sales. But in a trade-down economy, that playbook may be dangerously out of date. Americans are feeling financially stretched: 92% cut back on spending last year, including curbing essentials like healthcare and groceries. Is this really the time for Target to be focused on trendy throw pillows, luxury beauty products, and premium sodas?...

item.title: American Express just launched an insanely tiny airport lounge with only 33 seats. Here’s why it says it’s worth squeezing in
item.description: The new Sidecar at Harry Reid International Airport in Las Vegas gives Amex Platinum members with limited time a quick-stop space for food and drinks. Airport lounges are getting bigger, flashier, and increasingly crowded. American Express (Amex) believes the next evolution might actually be smaller.

item.title: La dernière montre de Garmin avec son écran Amoled de toute beauté baisse enfin son prix
item.description: La Garmin Forerunner 570se démarque avec une luminosité éclatante grâce à un écran AMOLED et chez I-Run, elle connaît une première promo et passe de 549 euros à 499 euros.

item.title: Mini PC deal: Lenovo ThinkCentre neo 50q Gen 4 mini desktop delivers serious business-class performance in a tiny box
item.description: Save 37% on the Lenovo ThinkCentre neo 50q Gen 4 with an 8-core Core i5-13420H processor, 16GB of DDR4 memory, and fast 512GB SSD.

item.title: Why buy a Chromebook? This Lenovo Windows 11 laptop deal is a smart pick for students and working from home - and it's only $370 right now
item.description: This 2026 Lenovo Windows 11 laptop is under $370 and perfect for home workers and students.

item.title: « Un PC que je vendais 399 euros, eh bien il va prendre 200 balles » : un géant chinois nous avertit sur le sombre futur de l’industrie
item.description: La crise de la mémoire vive bat son plein. Entre l'accaparement des ressources par les géants de l'IA et des coûts de production record, les prix grand public vont s'envoler partout. Un retour à la normale n'est pas envisagé avant 2028, forçant les constructeurs à revoir leurs fiches techniques à la baisse.

item.title: Audible launches a cheaper audiobook tier that’s perfect for entry-level listeners as Spotify continues to hike prices — here’s what you get with the new $9 plan
item.description: Despite a few caveats, Audible's Standard tier is ideal for new customers and casual readers alike.

item.title: How to watch India vs. England in the 2026 T20 World Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch T20 World Cup for free. Live stream India vs. England in the 2026 T20 World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Bitcoin, XRP, and other crypto prices are rising today. What Trump said on Truth Social to boost digital assets
item.description: With tokens sliding in value this year, the president just weighed in on cryptocurrency legislation. It’s not the only reason for this week’s reversal. Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies have had a rough 2026 so far.

item.title: Paint giant AkzoNobel reveals data breach, says US site was affected
item.description: Ransomware operators Anubis claimed the breach, saying it stole 170GB of sensitive data

item.title: Raycast’s Glaze is an all-in-one vibe coding app platform
item.description: AI tools like Claude Code have made it possible for users to build software with no coding knowledge whatsoever. That's not to say the process is easy, though: You may not need to write code directly, but you need to understand how your computer's terminal works, how to deploy and maintain software, and deal with […]

item.title: Three retro Mario titles are coming to Nintendo Switch Online on Mario Day
item.description: As if you needed reminding, next week is March 10, or MAR10 Day, as the marketing wizards at Nintendo have been calling it for the last decade or so. You can usually rely on Mario Day for some plumber-related goodies, and Nintendo has announced that three retro games are coming to Nintendo Switch Online next week. Those games are Mario’s Tennis and Mario Clash for the newly launched Virtual Boy app, and Mario Vs. Donkey Kong for the Game Boy Advance. Both the GBA and Virtual Boy emulators are part of the Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack membership plan, so you’ll need to be on that tier...

item.title: Méconnu en Europe, Tecno part à la conquête de la France avec ses PC portables acessibles
item.description: La marque asiatique profite du MWC 2026 pour accélérer massivement son développement dans l'Hexagone. Le fabricant chinois Tecno déploie une large gamme d'ordinateurs légers dopés à l'intelligence artificielle et un étonnant PC de jeu luxueux au format compact.

item.title: La base lunaire d'Elon Musk sera-t-elle imprimée en 3D au laser à partir du sol de la Lune et par des robots ?
item.description: On ne sait pas si Elon Musk contribuera vraiment à construire une base lunaire permanente en tant que sauvegarde de la civilisation humaine. Mais si tel est le cas, il devra utiliser pour l'étendre des technologies en cours de développement, parfois depuis plus d'un demi-siècle. On peut en voir...

item.title: ‘Sinners’ Is Obviously Great But Its Visual Effects Might Be Better
item.description: A new video details all of the technology and tricks used to bring Ryan Coogler's vampire film to life.

item.title: The Best Linux Laptops (I Install Linux on Every Laptop I Test) (2026)
item.description: Whether you want a beast of a machine with dedicated graphics or a light, easy-to-upgrade PC, we have the perfect rig for you.

item.title: Young Sherlock makes TV sleuth and Moriarty 'The Chuckle Brothers of detective work' — but episode 7 creates the evil villain we love to hate
item.description: Young Sherlock tells a wildly different origin story for Moriarty than the one we thought we knew — but the eventual villain is there if you know where to look.

item.title: GoPro’s first processor in 5 years ‘will debut in new GoPro cameras’ for 2026 – and we could get surprise new models beyond a new Hero Black
item.description: GoPro announces a new processing chip – and teases an imminent new action camera launch to boot

item.title: Boîte de réception | Compte Google, système Cúram et point d’accès mobile
item.description: Chaque mercredi, notre journaliste répond à vos questions en lien avec le numérique et les nouvelles technologies. Cette semaine, on calcule les heures travaillées que représente le système Cúram, on s’interroge sur la sécurité d’un point d’accès mobile et on se demande pourquoi Google tient absolument à nous identifier sur des sites tiers.

item.title: Magic The Gathering Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Draft Night preorders hit new low price at Amazon
item.description: Amazon preorders for MTG’s TMNT Draft Night box hit $86.99 — 28% off list ahead of its March 6, 2026 release.

item.title: Forget the Apple Studio Display — here are 3 better-value monitors for Macs with similar visual quality
item.description: You can get similar features to Apple’s Studio Display with these 3 monitors – and pay less, too.
